title: The Calm Room Method
subtitle: A field guide to rooms that breathe

hook: A practical design guide for editing visual noise, choosing quieter storage, and creating rooms that support daily life.
bullets: How to identify visual clutter before buying anything new
Neutral palette planning that still feels warm

title: Small Home Reset

hook: A compact-space organizing book for apartments, starter homes, and multi-use rooms that need to work harder.
bullets: Entry, kitchen, and closet reset plans
How to choose containers that disappear

title: The Edited Kitchen

hook: A kitchen-focused guide to counters, cabinets, pantry zones, and the tools worth keeping close.
